description: Makes Wicket site configuration portable, reviewable, and repeatable.
name: industrialdev/wicket-wp-portus

scripts.production: composer install && composer cs:fix && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader
scripts.setup-hooks: mkdir -p .git/hooks && cp .ci/pre-push .git/hooks/pre-push && chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-push && echo 'Git hooks installed to .git/hooks/pre-push'

scripts-descriptions.cs:format: Run PHP CS Fixer to fix coding standards issues
scripts-descriptions.cs:lint: Run PHP CS Fixer to check coding standards
